info.name: Box Chicken Boneless Biryani
info.description: Serves 1 chicken boneless biryani is flavourful and aromatic basmati rice layered with tender boneless chicken, and herbs, served in eco-friendly, 100% biodegradable containers. Biryani rice-350grams approx,chicken pieces-140grams approx

info.name: Box Meghana Special Boneless Biryani
info.description: Serves 1 I meghana special biryani is flavourful and aromatic basmati rice layered with an extra egg coating with our in-house andra spice, served in eco-friendly, 100% biodegradable containers. Biryani rice-350grams approx,chicken pieces-140grams approx

info.name: Box Paneer Biryani
info.description: Serves 1 I paneer biryani  is flavourful and aromatic basmati rice layered with panner and with spices and herbs, served in eco-friendly, 100% biodegradable containers. Biryani rice-350grams approx,panner pieces-140grams approx

info.name: Box Spl Veg Biryani
info.description: Serves 1i spl veg biryani is flavourful and aromatic basmati rice layered with our andra spice blend and paneer, along with a bunch of fresh veggies. Served in eco-friendly, 100% biodegradable containers. Biryani rice-350grams approx ,spl veg-140grams approx

info.name: Box Egg Biryani
info.description: Serves 1i egg biryani is flavourful and aromatic basmati rice layered with two hard-boiled eggs cooked in our freshly made spice mix, served in eco-friendly, 100% biodegradable containers. Biryani rice-350grams approx,boiled egg-2 nos

info.name: Box Aloo Dum Biryani
